title: Indulgent American Beef Kidney Gratin
description: A rich and savory beef kidney dish with a crispy, golden-brown topping, perfect for a cold evening meal.
instructions: Sauté the chopped onion in butter until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Season the beef kidneys with salt and pepper, then sear them in the skillet until browned on both sides.
Transfer the kidneys to a baking dish, then add the sautéed onion and garlic mixture on top.
In a separate saucepan, deglaze the skillet with beef broth, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Stir in the mushroom duxelles and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Pour the duxelles mixture over the kidneys, then sprinkle the grated Gruyère cheese on top.
Finish with a dollop of heavy cream and a sprinkle of black pepper.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, until the top is golden brown and crispy.
Let the gratin rest for a few minutes before serving.
